title: tests/rpm.bats: use Fedora 27
body: Update tests/rpm.bats to use Fedora 27, and add "make" as a build requirement in the .spec file that it uses, which I don't think is part of the latest set of images.

comments.body: I don't see the make change?
That got quietly added in #341, so doing it here would just add a duplicate.
